title: Slovakian Sausage and Potato Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole filled with Slovakian sausages, potatoes, and a blend of earthy spices.
instructions: Slice the onion and mince the garlic.
Cook the Slovakian Sausages in a pan over medium heat, breaking them up with a spoon as they cook.
Add the onion and garlic to the pan and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the potatoes, caraway seeds, paprika, salt, and black pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender and the top is golden brown.
